gist.headline: Tidying the birdhouse
gist.blurb: We've swept away the last of the legacy Tinybird public tokens, keeping our observability pipelines neat and tidy with a single unified token.
gist.summary: Removed legacy public Tinybird token directives from observability endpoints to align the repository with the live workspace cleanup.
gist.impact: This internal cleanup prevents repository drift and consolidates public endpoint access under a single unified token.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee sweeping up old, dusty golden tokens or tickets into a dustpan, while a single shiny new token glows on a pedestal. A tiny bird (representing Tinybird) watches happily from a perch.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot sweeping up dusty golden tokens with a tiny broom, while a single glowing token rests on a pedestal. A small blue bird watches happily from a nearby retro monitor. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
